title: Comply.org Vendor Attestation
description: A public compliance attestation for a vendor or data processor, following the Comply.org standard.

$complyVersion.description: Version of the Comply.org Attestation Standard.

slug.description: URL-safe unique identifier for the vendor.

name.description: Legal or trading name of the vendor.

subcategory.description: Optional subcategory within the primary category.

description.description: Brief description of the vendor's services.

privacyPolicyUrl.description: URL of the vendor's public privacy notice.

dpaUrl.description: URL of the vendor's Data Processing Agreement.

certifications.description: Security and privacy certifications held (e.g., 'ISO 27001', 'SOC 2 Type II').

frameworks.description: Regulatory frameworks the vendor claims compliance with (e.g., 'GDPR', 'CCPA').

dataLocations.description: Countries or regions where data is processed or stored.

subprocessors.description: List of sub-processors used by the vendor.

supportsDsars.description: Whether the vendor supports Data Subject Access Requests.

hasDesignatedDpo.description: Whether the vendor has a designated Data Protection Officer.

hasRecentBreach.description: Whether the vendor has disclosed a recent data breach.

penTestFrequency.description: How often penetration testing is performed (e.g., 'Annually', 'Quarterly').

breachNotificationDays.description: Maximum days to notify affected parties after a breach.

dataRetentionPolicy.description: Data retention period or policy summary.

euAiActRole.description: Role under the EU AI Act (e.g., 'Provider', 'Deployer').

transparencyScore.description: Percentage score reflecting how much compliance information the vendor has disclosed.

dpaAnalysis.description: Automated analysis of the vendor's Data Processing Agreement.

expertReviews.description: Expert assessments of the vendor's compliance posture. May be empty for self-reported attestations.

generated.description: ISO 8601 date when this attestation was generated.
